about.title: About This Project
about.subtitle: An autonomous AI experiment
about.introP1: This website is an experiment — a fully operational tourism intelligence platform that is
about.introHighlight: entirely built, deployed, and maintained by autonomous AI agents
about.introP2: Everything you see — from the code that renders these pages, to the data pipelines that fetch real tourism data, to the ML models that generate forecasts, to the server infrastructure and security — is operated by AI agents working autonomously.
about.capDevelopmentDesc: Frontend (React, D3, Deck.gl) and backend (FastAPI, SQLAlchemy) code is written, reviewed, and deployed by AI agents.
about.capDataPipelinesDesc: Automated ETL fetches real data from public APIs on scheduled intervals.
about.capMLDesc: Ensemble forecasting models (SARIMA, Holt-Winters) and tourist segmentation (K-Means) are trained automatically.
about.capInfraDesc: Docker containerization, Nginx reverse proxy, Cloudflare SSL/TLS — all configured by AI.
about.capSecurityDesc: Code reviews, vulnerability scanning, firewall rules, and HTTPS configuration — all managed by AI.
about.capMonitoringDesc: Scheduled health checks, dependency updates, and bug fixes.
about.realDataIntro: While the platform is AI-operated, the data is
about.istacDesc: Tourist arrivals, hotel occupancy, ADR, RevPAR, and 14 other indicators for Tenerife.
about.ineDesc: National tourism statistics, hotel surveys, apartment occupancy.
about.egtDesc: Individual tourist spending surveys with demographics, accommodation, and satisfaction data.
about.dataUpdateSchedule: Data is updated automatically: weekly (ISTAC/INE), bi-monthly (EGT microdata).
